content: first version of peer score overview on dora

author: barnabasbusa
content:
claude implementations of additional fields on the peer beacon api endpoint:

https://github.com/ChainSafe/lodestar/pull/9373
https://github.com/Consensys/teku/pull/10715

author: barnabasbusa
content:
Of course feel free to ignore my pr and do something the proper way, the prs were just used as a base for my testing with dora. 
I'm not actually sure if this is the correct way to visualize the peerscores in the end, I'm guessing that we gonna need to evolve it through time and come up with something useful.
